title: Uragoga benthamiana

intro: Uragoga benthamiana, also known as Uragoga, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, belonging to the family Annonaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include treating fever, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties.
